{{Quote|Dem docs alla time yellin' 'Fix dis! Fix dat!' like they 'spect me t'pull t' spare parts outta m'backside! Supply ain't deegle dung on dis world, you bet. Docs.|Rorand Zuzz|<ref name="MedStar I: Battle Surgeons">''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]''</ref>}}
'''Rorand Zuzz''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] who was a [[tech specialist]] skilled in working with medical equipment.

==Biography==
In [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]], he was stationed on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and survived the attack of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces made against [[Republic Mobile Surgical Unit/Legends|Republic Mobile Surgical Unit 7]]. Afterward, he would take up his business in a new location. When Republic forces stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] discovered that the [[Bota/Legends|Bota]] that grew there no longer had any use, Rorand and the entire Republic operation, along with the Separatists, evacuated Drongar.
